Use Case: Accounts Payable using AI/ ML
SAP PO generated and emailed to Vendor & Requestor
Minimal disruption / reduction of work on for end uses. They continue current process
PO process is highly compliant with line details now available – without additional effort
End to End trackability of PO requests, approval status, PO Creation with timelines
Seamless integration into SAP with line level data for further use
Fully digitized and system enabled extraction
60% on these process and can be improved further
Seamless integration into SAP with line level data for further use
End to End trackability of GRN, Invoices & improved timelines as it can be fully automated
Seamless integration into SAP with line level data for further use
AI Analysis of eCommerce, ERP data to determine profitability, and complete MIS & guidance for P2P and O2C
Comprehensive and Integrated Travel management System, with integration of  Sabre data to provide daily insights on bookings, revenue, and profitability across Air, Car, and Hotels.
Analysis of vast amounts of data from multiple sources to be able to identify revenue leakage and credit note causal analysis
Sample Use Case: Fingertips for eCommerce Marketplace Sellers
An e-commerce company struggled with tracking performance and managing inventory effectively.
lack of real-time visibility into critical metrics hindered decision-making.
Manual reporting made it difficult to optimize operations.
As a result, strategic planning and growth were consistently impacted
Actionable intelligence supported smarter, data-driven decisions.
Coverage spanned sales, inventory, pricing, liabilities, and receivables ageing.
Data was scattered across sales, inventory, pricing, and liabilities systems.
Manual analysis limited actionable insights and slowed responsiveness.
Decisions were often delayed due to lack of real-time visibility.
The business faced inefficiencies that reduced competitiveness.
An analytics platform provided a centralized KPI dashboard for visibility.
Dynamic visualizations enabled trend detection and performance monitoring.
Delivered a unified view of critical business metrics and trends.
Enabled real-time, data-driven strategic and operational decisions.
Automated reporting cut manual workload and improved efficiency.
Optimized inventory, pricing, and liabilities management to drive growth.
Ecommerce marketplace Operates with 10–15 logistics partners, managing thousands of shipments daily.
Variables include pin code, shipment mode, weight, zone, and service level.
Dashboards provide transparency and provide transaction insights
Detailed logs ensure regulatory compliance and readiness for audits.
Solution: AI Based Logistics Reconciliation Tool
Contract complexity – thousands of rate combinations, frequently changing
, failed deliveries, returns, surcharges and COD
Huge volume needing validation with lengthy resolution cycles
Automated data ingestion, dynamic contract management, AI Powered audit engine that automates dispute handling and tracks resolution
Identified significant overpayments, safeguarding 2–5% of monthly freight spend.
Reduced reconciliation time from weeks to 1–2 days, automating 75–85% of invoice lines.
Other AI use cases at Pierian
Daily reconciliation of data from different payment gateways, with bank records and Orders from ERP
Reconciliation of shipment invoices from logistics providers with shipment data from ERP and rate card
An AI Agent to assist prospective and existing students offering admission assistance and student assistance for transactions
Automated processing of Accounts payable using a workflow built with multi-functional agents
Automated workflows for Follow up and communication with customers on unpaid ageing invoices
Reconciliation of credit card statements and GL Accounting entries
AI Analysis of Key Account Manager interactions with Vendors and identifying improvements and actions needed to improve service levels
Reconciliation of Bank transfers and Hospital billing records with data from portals
Agentic services for Employee services in IT, HR, Facilities and procurement
Agentic AI Support for Vendor Support
AI Analysis of interactions with Vendors to improve service levels
SOA, Vendor Reconciliation and GL Accounting entries
